ac_results.evidence: git check-ignore exits 1 (docs/reference/tmp-cleanup-convention.md is NOT ignored). git ls-files docs/reference/ | wc -l = 12 exactly. .gitignore line 71 has '!docs/reference/' negation below '!docs/dev/' at line 69, with inline comment documenting rationale.

Created /tmp/test-scores.json with ba score at 100. Ran scripts/score-update.sh --agent ba --event close_success_qa_pass --scores-file /tmp/test-scores.json (exit 0). Python check confirms uncapped_delta=108, new_score=100. score-update.sh line 152: uncapped_delta = old_score + delta (pre-clamp). Line 153: new_score = max(0, min(100, old_score + delta)) unchanged. Line 164: 'uncapped_delta' added to history.append() dict. Additive-only — no threshold was lowered, no validation was removed.

git log -1 --format=%H -- docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md exits 0 with SHA 5771880. git ls-files docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/views/ | grep -q exits 0 (10 view files tracked). git diff --name-only HEAD^..HEAD shows ONLY: docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md and docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/views/{INDEX.md,README.md,architect.md,ba.md,dev.md,mandate-omissions.json,manifest.json,orchestrator.md,qa.md}. build_verification.skip_reason: No compiled artifacts or deployed services affected. All changes are git config (.gitignore), shell script (tmp-cleanup-install.sh), Python script (score-update.sh), file creation (logs/lifecycle.jsonl), and git metadata. No web-facing services modified.

e2e_enforcement.skip_justification: No user-facing UI components modified. All changes are infrastructure: gitignore rules, an install mirror script, a scoring script additive field, a log file creation, and spec git commit. Playwright E2E not applicable.

overall_notes: All 5 acceptance criteria passed manual command verification and pytest. Both commits are in git with correct scope: af96c61 contains M1-M4 infrastructure changes plus cycle artifacts (normal pattern); 5771880 contains only spec+views (scope-contained as required by AC5). The uncapped_delta field is correctly additive-only in score-update.sh with no weakening of existing checks. The cp-state-qa.json shows is_running=true with all 6 checkpoints already in state waived-with-reason from a prior qa invocation (qa-1 at 2026-05-22T10:25:08Z).
